maven-plugin/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmn.general_idea: Replace manual URLClassLoader construction with a new classpath loading strategy using absolute file paths.
maven-plugin/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmn.why_exists: The old method relied on `ProjectClassLoader` and `URLClassLoader` which may be deprecated or incompatible with the new module system or security manager settings in Java 17; the new method uses `File.getAbsolutePath`.

maven-plugin/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmn.general_idea: Implement the `failOnWarning` method required by the `PluginBase` interface.
maven-plugin/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmn.why_exists: Compile error: class does not implement abstract method `failOnWarning()` in `PluginBase`.

plugin-base/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmnc.general_idea: Remove unused Checker Framework annotations that are no longer needed or compatible with the new dependency version.
plugin-base/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmnc.why_exists: Compile error due to missing or incompatible import paths for removed/renamed Checker Framework classes.
